title: [release-1.37] Bump to Buildah v1.37.3
body:
Bump to v1.37.3 in preparation of Podman v5.2.3

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

-->

Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/buildah/blob/release-1.37/OWNERS)~~ [TomSweeneyRedHat] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Is this for a podman 5.3 or a podman 5.2.3?
Podman 5.2.3 at the moment.  If we go to Podman 5.3 later this fall, I'd plan a Buildah Bump to v1.38

OK, I'm going to use the merge bat on this one.
/lgtm
